# opensearch_dashboard_workspace (Resource)

Provides an OpenSearch Dashboards workspace resource.

This resource uses the OpenSearch Dashboards API, so the provider must be configured with `dashboards_url`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "opensearch" {
  url            = "http://127.0.0.1:9200"
  dashboards_url = "http://127.0.0.1:5601"
}

resource "opensearch_dashboard_workspace" "logs" {
  name        = "Logs"
  description = "Production log analysis"
  features    = ["use-case-observability"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Workspace name.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Workspace description.
- `features` (Set of String) Workspace features, such as use-case-all or use-case-observability.
- `permissions` (String) Workspace permissions object as JSON.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import opensearch_dashboard_workspace.logs workspace-id
```
